chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-319 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 269/19 2. For orders on statement as flagged. 14.01.2019 Mr. Pervaiz Tariq Tagar, Advocate for petitioner...... 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
